title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Bolloré Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Bolloré Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
